rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MAGGIE LEE SYKES
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF SALVADOR M. NAJARRO
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Summary Judgement, Or, Summary Adjudication Of Issues; Separate Statement Of Undisputed Facts; Points And Authorities; Declaration Of L. Najarro With Exhibits; Request For Judicial Notice; Proof Of Service.
rulings.Rulings: Tentative ruling on Motion for Summary Judgment: Denied. There is a triable issue of material fact as to whether the Oneida property is in the Najarro Family Trust. Exhibits A, B and C to the declaration of Lillian Najarro do not prove as a matter of law that the Oneida property is in the Najarro Family Trust. Tentative ruling on Motion for Summary Adjudication. Denied. Petitioner has failed to comply with CRC 3.1350(b). Evidentiary rulings. The following objections are sustained: 4,5,6,7,8,9,12,15,16,17,18,19,20,21,and 22. The following objections are overruled: 1,2,3,10,13 and 14. Objection 11 is sustained on conclusionary grounds as to the term "community property" and is overruled as to the rest of the statement on both grounds raised.
